findings.description: The HTML includes fabricated boilerplate/theme content not present in the source PDF, including a CSS comment and external font import.
findings.evidence: HTML head contains text not in the PDF: "/* Digital Commons NC — Standalone Theme CSS */" and "@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Sans+3...')". The PDF page only contains the agenda content and no such branding, stylesheet text, or URL.

findings.description: Heading structure is incomplete relative to the document hierarchy in the PDF. Only "AGENDA" is marked as an h1, while the committee/title lines are left as paragraph text instead of subordinate headings.
findings.evidence:
PDF visually presents stacked title lines: "AGENDA", "NEUSE RIVER BASIN HYDROLOGIC MODEL", "TECHNICAL REVIEW COMMITTEE", "MEETING". HTML uses only

AGENDA

and places the remaining title lines inside a

block.
